description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named compile and test that runs on push, pull request, and workflow dispatch events. The workflow checks if a job should be skipped using fkirc/skip-duplicate-actions and then runs multiple jobs with different environments (ubuntu-2004, ubuntu-2204, archlinux-gcc, archlinux-clang-clazy, fedora34, opensuse-tumbleweed) to configure, build, and test a project using cmake and ctest.
